creator: john@jmarshall.id.au
text:
Created attachment 157874
Add year to VAX-11/780 entry (10/25) in calendar.computer

Year missing from VAX-11/780 entry in calendar.computer. The existing calendar entry cites October 25 as the date. Google search results associate the year 1977 with that date. For example:

 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/VAX-11
 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/VAX

The attached patch adds the year 1977 to the entry.
